summary: Razorpay Standard Checkout integration tested end-to-end. All 9 backend payment endpoints verified (create-order valid/invalid/idempotency, verify wrong/correct/idempotent signature, /report unlock, GET payment doc without signature/_id, /failure). Frontend Payment.jsx renders correctly, loads Razorpay SDK, opens real Razorpay modal (iframe URL contains razorpay), pay button disabled during processing.
passed: POST /api/payments/create-order {plan:ai_review, amount:299} -> 200 order_id starts with 'order_', amount=29900, currency=INR, key_id=rzp_test_T5NQnxhQ1xS2Li
Idempotency: authenticated user second call returns SAME order_id within 10min
POST /api/payments/verify with wrong signature -> 400 'Signature verification failed', mongo status='verification_failed'
POST /api/payments/verify with correct HMAC-SHA256(order|payment) -> 200 {ok:true,status:'paid'}, mongo status='paid', payment_id set
GET /api/report after paid verify -> unlocked=true; user has_report=true
GET /api/payments/{order_id} -> returns doc without 'signature' and without '_id'
Frontend /payment?plan=ai_review renders 'Complete your payment', ₹299 total (4 occurrences), 'Pay ₹299 securely' button with data-testid=pay-now-btn
window.Razorpay defined on page load (SDK loaded)
Click pay-now-btn shows 'Preparing checkout…' loader, calls create-order, opens real Razorpay iframe (URL contains razorpay.com)
Pay button disabled during processing (prevents duplicate clicks)
Razorpay modal branded 'RizzLab', Test Mode banner visible, ₹299, UPI/Cards/EMI options rendered

failed.issue: Could not automate closing the outer Razorpay modal to trigger pay-closed-msg — ESC key only dismissed the inner contact-details layer. Razorpay iframe captures focus and its close X is inside the iframe (cross-origin, not clickable via Playwright).
failed.evidence: ondismiss handler is correctly wired in Payment.jsx L77-82 to set closedMsg=true and POST /payments/failure with reason='user_dismissed'; the /payments/failure endpoint was independently verified working (test T9). Feature is implemented correctly; only automated E2E dismiss simulation is not feasible.

notes: Failure modal (pay-failure-modal/pay-retry-btn/pay-goback-btn) code paths present in Payment.jsx but not triggered in automation since verify errors require an actual payment. Route /loading exists (verified by successful navigate on paid handler wiring).
